---
title: "Regression Tables"
author: "Carilli"
date: "12/30/2020"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, options(scipen = 999, digits = 3), 
                      comment = NA, eval = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(plm)
library(stargazer)
df <- 
  here::here("data/covid_data_final.csv") %>% 
  read_csv()
```

# Table 1 {.tabset}

## models

```{r table-1-models, eval=TRUE}
model_twoways <- 
  df %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

model_oneway_no_controls <- 
  df %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
  
model_oneway_with_controls <- 
  df %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2) +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

```

## table

```{r table-1, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', eval=TRUE}
stargazer(
  model_twoways,
  model_oneway_no_controls,
  model_oneway_with_controls,
  header = FALSE,
  type = "latex",
  df = FALSE,
  # align = TRUE,
  title = "Regression Results",
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days",
    "Social Capital Dummy",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days squared",
    "Median Household Income",
    "Percent of Adults with Bachelor's Degree",
    "Percent of Adults in Fair or Poor Health",
    "Percent of Population that is Black",
    "Population Density",
    "Percent of Population in Rural Areas",
    "Percent of Population greater than 65 years old",
    "Average Temperature",
    "Republican Governor",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days * Social Capital Dummy"
  ),
  # column.labels = c(
  #   "Two-way Fixed Effects",
  #   "One-way Fixed Effects",
  #   "One-way Fixed Effects"
  # ),
  # # style = "aer",
  dep.var.labels = "Daily New Cases per Million"#,
  
)

```

# Table 2 {.tabset}
## models
```{r table-2-models}
model_penn_state <- 
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = scp_version_of_penn_state_index) %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

model_putnam <- 
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = putnam_index) %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

model_alesina <- 
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = alesina_la_ferrara_social_capital_group) %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
```

## table

```{r table-2, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
stargazer(
  model_alesina,
  model_putnam,
  model_penn_state,
  header = FALSE,
  df = FALSE,
  type = "latex",
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days squared",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days * Social Capital Dummy"
  ),
  title = "Alternate Social Capital Measures",
  column.labels = c(
    "Alesina La Ferrara",
    "Putnam",
    "Penn State"
  ),
  # style = "aer",
  dep.var.labels = "Daily New Cases per Million",
  float.env = "table*"
)
```



# Table 3 {.tabset}
## models
```{r table-3-models}
model_mar_may <- 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = df %>% filter(date <= "2020-05-31"),
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
model_jun_aug <- 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = df %>% filter(date >= "2020-06-01" & date <= "2020-08-31"),
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
model_sep_nov <- 
plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = df %>% filter(date >= "2020-09-01"),
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
```

## table

```{r table-3, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
stargazer(
  model_mar_may,
  model_jun_aug,
  model_sep_nov,
  header = FALSE,
  type = "latex",
  df = FALSE,
  # align = TRUE,
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days",
    #   "Social Capital Dummy",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days squared",
    #   "Median Household Income",
    #   "Percent of Adults with Bachelor's Degree",
    #   "Percent of Adults in Fair or Poor Health",
    #   "Percent of Population that is Black",
    #   "Population Density",
    #   "Percent of Population in Rural Areas",
    #   "Percent of Population greater than 65 years old",
    #   "Average Temperature",
    #   "Republican Governor",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days * Social Capital Dummy"
  ),
  title = "Regression Results by Season",
  column.labels = c(
    "Mar - May",
    "Jun- Aug",
    "Sep - Nov"
  ),
  # style = "aer",
  dep.var.labels = "Daily New Cases per Million"#,
)
```

# Table 4

## models

```{r table-4-models}
model_one_sd <- 
  df %>%
  mutate(state_level_dummy = ifelse(state_level_index >= 1, 1, 0)) %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
```

## table 4

```{r table-4, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
stargazer(
  model_one_sd,
  header = FALSE,
  type = "latex",
  df = FALSE,
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days squared",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days * Social Capital Dummy"
  ),
  title = "Positive Social Capital >= 1 Standard Deviation",
  dep.var.labels = "Daily New Cases per Million"
)
```
